caption: In an indoor office or classroom setting, three young women are seated around a light-colored wooden table. The woman in the foreground has blonde hair tied with a white scrunchie and wears a white face mask. To her right, a woman with dark hair in a bun and a black face mask looks down at a phone. The woman furthest right has long brown hair and wears a white face mask and a dark blue long-sleeved shirt. She is seen fidgeting with her hands, holding a small object. On the table sit a bright green water bottle, papers, and a small brown paper bag. A purple logo of a leaping figure is visible on the left, next to the text "Day 1", while the text "Sim Week" appears on the right. Throughout the sequence, the women remain in their positions, with minimal movement as the woman on the right continues to manipulate the object in her hands.
